home.talkBody: Do you have an idea, project or proposal? Let's make it happen.

about.title: This section is now Blog
about.intro: Hello, I'm Martín. I spent almost 10 years in the business world until I discovered that code was my thing too. Today I focus on software development, mixing my business experience with the creativity of programming and implementing AI. I enjoy working with web technologies like JavaScript, React, Node.js, but above all I'm passionate about learning, building and sharing projects that really add value to people.
about.p1b: , where I will publish my writings. Update your bookmarks.

projects.kuyuriyCentroTeaser: Psychopedagogy and psychology center. Institutional website with form and analytics integration.
projects.cspadelTeaser: Main website and lead generation landing page for sports events.
projects.natipsicopeTeaser: Landing page and registration for specialized workshops.
projects.andesVeloTeaser: Sports tourism platform prototype, centralizing routes, gastronomy, and hospitality.
projects.campusAutoSpaTeaser: Payment, scheduling, and business tracking platform for a car wash business.
projects.visitRepos: Visit my repositories to see more work.
